# komodo_action (Resource)

Manages a Komodo action resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "komodo_action" "example" {
  name = "my-action"

  file_contents = <<-EOT
    export default async function run(): Promise<void> {
      console.log("Hello from Komodo action!");
    }
  EOT
}

resource "komodo_action" "scheduled" {
  name             = "nightly-cleanup"
  schedule_format  = "Cron"
  schedule         = "0 0 * * *"
  schedule_enabled = true
  failure_alert    = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique name of the action. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `arguments` (String) Default arguments passed to the action as the `ARGS` variable.
- `arguments_format` (String) The format for action arguments (e.g. `KeyValue` or `Toml`).
- `failure_alert` (Boolean) Whether to send an alert when the action fails.
- `file_contents` (String) TypeScript file contents using the Komodo client.
- `reload_deno_deps` (Boolean) Whether to reload Deno dependencies on each run.
- `run_at_startup` (Boolean) Whether to run the action at Komodo startup.
- `schedule` (String) The schedule expression (cron string or English description).
- `schedule_alert` (Boolean) Whether to send an alert when the action runs on schedule.
- `schedule_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the schedule is enabled.
- `schedule_format` (String) The schedule format. One of `Cron` or `English`.
- `schedule_timezone` (String) Timezone for the schedule (IANA TZ identifier, e.g. `America/New_York`).
- `webhook_enabled` (Boolean) Whether to allow triggering the action via webhook.
- `webhook_secret` (String, Sensitive) Override the default webhook secret for this action.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The action identifier (ObjectId).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import komodo_action.example 6627c3e4f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8
```
